title: Apple-style full-screen calendar overlay with 40% transparency + deploy

requirements.text: Implement an Apple-style full-screen calendar overlay for the date picker in the Daily Entry screen (frontend/src/pages/DailyEntry.tsx). When the user taps the date field, open a full-screen modal overlay with a 40% transparent/frosted-glass background (backdrop with rgba or bg-opacity-40 blur effect). The modal must contain a large monthly calendar grid with: clean minimal Apple-inspired typography, muted weekday header labels (S M T W T F S), a subtle 'today' indicator, and an elegant filled-circle highlight on the selected day. Include smooth open/close CSS transition animations (fade + slide-up). Dismiss the overlay on swipe-down gesture or tap outside the calendar card. The calendar card itself should have a solid (non-transparent) surface so day labels and numbers remain fully readable against the transparent backdrop.

quotes: Make sure when you select calendar it shows up full screen
Calendar should be transparent with 40% transparency

acceptanceCriteria: Tapping the date input in Daily Entry opens a full-screen overlay
The overlay backdrop has exactly 40% opacity (transparent/frosted appearance)
The calendar card (grid container) has a solid opaque surface so text is readable
Month grid is large, filling most of the screen width
Weekday headers are displayed in a muted, minimal style
Today's date has a subtle indicator (e.g., dot or ring)
The selected date has a filled-circle highlight consistent with Apple Calendar aesthetic
Overlay opens with a smooth fade + slide-up animation
Overlay closes with a matching reverse animation
Tapping outside the calendar card dismisses the overlay
Swiping down on the overlay dismisses it
The selected date is correctly applied to the date field in the form after selection
Works correctly in both light mode and dark mode

requirements.text: Deploy the updated SwipeTrack Pro application (frontend with the new Apple-style calendar overlay) to the Internet Computer mainnet/production network, replacing the current live deployment and making the update publicly accessible.
acceptanceCriteria: The updated frontend is successfully deployed to the Internet Computer mainnet
The live canister URL serves the new build with the Apple-style calendar overlay
The backend canister remains functional and unchanged
No regressions in existing features post-deployment

constraints: Do not modify any file under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
The calendar overlay must not interfere with existing form state management in DailyEntry.tsx
The 40% transparency must be on the backdrop/overlay layer only — the calendar grid card itself must remain fully readable
nonGoals: Redesigning any screen other than the Daily Entry date picker calendar
Adding calendar views to Dashboard, Analytics, Leaves, or Export screens
Modifying the backend schema or any backend endpoints
